block_14: The next step is to make your promo materials look natural for a foreign audience. Consider this step half-done: our

block_20: Don’t expect immediate results. It takes time to fully tweak your campaigns to a new market. Slowly and gradually, spread your affiliate efforts to the new regions, see what works and what doesn’t, and edit your strategy accordingly.
block_21: 5. KEEP THE EXISTING CAMPAIGNS LIVE
block_22: Don’t abandon the existing geos if your experience with them wasn’t a booming success. You never know which region will become a new Eldorado of affiliate marketing tomorrow (for example, thanks to a new law or improving Internet connectivity). Stay at the forefront to get the best profits when the time comes.
block_23: See, expanding your digital presence is easy! Act fast — the sooner you start, the bigger success you will achieve.
